---
title: "Frame Dependence"
categories: [choices]

subtitle: "Our preference between identical options changes depending on how the problem is presented."
listing:
  contents: "."
  type: grid
  sort: "title asc"
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    categories: "{framing}"
  fields: [title, description]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

It's when our choices change depending on the framing of a problem; in other words, options are not always evaluated in absolute terms but relative to the way they are presented.
